pages.title: About - Bridget Phillipson
pages.meta_description: Labour Member of Parliament for Houghton and Sunderland South
pages.text_excerpt: About - Bridget Phillipson Skip to main content Bridget Phillipson Labour Member of Parliament for Houghton and Sunderland South Join Get Involved Donate About Recent Activity Articles Speeches Contact Sign Up Media Gallery More Menu About Bridget Phillipson Bridget is the Labour Member of Parliament for Houghton and Sunderland South ; one of three constituencies in the City of Sunderland. She was first elected to the seat on 6 May 2010, and was most recently re-elected at the 2024 General Election. She is also the Secretary of State for Education and Minister for Women and Equalities. Short biography Bridget was born and raised in Washington, attending local schools and joining the Labour Party aged 15. After reading Modern History at Hertford College, Oxford – where she was also Co-Chair of the University Labour Club – Bridget returned to the North East. Before becoming an MP, Bridget managed a refuge for women and children fleeing domestic violence. Since her election in 2010, Bridget has served as an Opposition Whip, and on a number of Parliamentary select committees, including the high-profile Public Accounts Committee. In April 2020 she joined the Shadow Cabinet as Shadow Chief Secretary to the Treasury, before being appointed Shadow Education Secretary in November 2021. In July 2024, she was appointed Secretary of State for Education and Minister for Women and Equalities by Prime Minister Keir Starmer. Bridget is married with two children. You can see all of Bridget's Parliamentary Activity by clicking here Bridget Phillipson Contact details 106 Newbottle Street, Houghton le Spring, UK View on Google Maps Further details Promoted by Les Scott on behalf of Bridget Phillipson, both at 13 Parkside, Sunderland, SR3 3RH. ©2026 BridgetPhillipson.com - All rights reserved - View our Privacy Policy here and our Disability Access commitment here. pages.title: Get in touch with Bridget - Bridget Phillipson
pages.meta_description: Labour Member of Parliament for Houghton and Sunderland South
pages.text_excerpt: Get in touch with Bridget - Bridget Phillipson Skip to main content Bridget Phillipson Labour Member of Parliament for Houghton and Sunderland South Join Get Involved Donate About Recent Activity Articles Speeches Contact Sign Up Media Gallery More Menu Get in touch with Bridget Bridget Phillipson Labour Member of Parliament for Houghton and Sunderland South Address 106 Newbottle Street, Houghton le Spring, UK View on Google Maps Bridget’s role is to represent you as a constituent within the Houghton and Sunderland South Constituency, regardless of your politics. Not sure if you’re a constituent? Check here . If you’re concerned about a local or national issue Bridget can make representations on your behalf to the government, Sunderland City Council or other agency and will keep you informed about your case. If you would like Bridget’s help, use the form below to set out the details of your case and your contact information. By filling in your personal contact details and providing Bridget Phillipson MP with information about your views, you consent to allowing Bridget Phillipson MP and her staff to use the information you’ve given, as well as other information to which we have an entitlement, to contact you by email, text, phone, websites and apps even though you may be registered with the Telephone Preference Service. If you have any questions about our privacy policy, the information we have collected from you online, the practices of this site or your interaction with this website, please contact us by clicking here . For our full privacy policy and how we use your data please see click here. Advice Surgeries Bridget holds regular advice surgeries at different community venues around the constituency. If you would like to attend please contact Bridget’s constituency office on 0191 584 4317 or email bridget.phillipson.mp@parliament.uk to find out when the next surgery is taking place in your area. Contact Bridget: Email: bridget.phillipson.mp@parliament.uk Write to: 106 Newbottle street, Houghton le Spring, DH4 4AJ Phone: 0191 584 4317 Or by filling in the following form: Your details : First name * Last name * Email Address * Full Postal Address (in order to confirm you are a constituent) * Permission Yes, I would like to receive updates, information and event invitations from Bridget Phillipson MP. I'm happy to get updates, information and invitations to future events from Bridget Phillipson MP. What is the issue you are concerned about? Bridget Phillipson Contact details 106 Newbottle Street, Houghton le Spring, UK View on Google Maps Further details Promoted by Les Scott on behalf of Bridget Phillipson, both at 13 Parkside, Sunderland, SR3 3RH. ©2026 BridgetPhillipson.com - All rights reserved - View our Privacy Policy here and our Disability Access commitment here.
